priceUpdate: SOL is -10.5% in the last 24h and -7.3% over the last 7 days, while sentiment is still extreme fear. That keeps the setup tradable, but not stable yet. 24h volume is about $4.40B, which shows active trading. The key question is whether buyers keep rotating into Solana instead of back into BTC and ETH. Near-term direction depends on whether new product launches headlines turn into real usage (wallets, swaps, borrowing), led by Bitcoin slides to $65,000 in weekend sell-off, with solana, XRP.
thisWeek: The lead setup this week is Bitcoin slides to $65,000 in weekend sell-off, with solana, XRP, dogecoin down 6%, with traders now reacting to specific Solana headlines. Next up is Morgan Stanley applies for OCC bank charter to custody crypto. These stories only matter if they drive measurable usage, borrowing, and trading depth. Watch wallet growth, swaps, and perps depth around new product launches first.
nextWeek: Into next week, keep Magic Eden Pulls Plug on Bitcoin and Ethereum Support, Doubles Down on Solana on watch because it can pull incremental institutional and trading flow into the Solana complex. If that flow broadens beyond one headline, trend quality usually improves. If not, expect rotation and chop instead of continuation.
whatsHot: What's hot: ai agents, yield, new products are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
